name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 63-64 of operational silence (no verified video/audio). **NO IRANIAN STATE MEDIA HAS PRODUCED VERIFIABLE CORROBORATION OF PEZESHKIAN'S MAY 8 CLAIM OF A 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE MEETING WITH MOJTABA IN THE 48 HOURS SINCE.** No date, location, participant list, readout, video, photo, or audio. The information vacuum is widening, not narrowing. CNN/KVIA US-intel assessment that Mojtaba is 'alive and shaping strategy' but 'out of public view' unchanged. **This is itself an intelligence signal:** if a credible meeting had occurred, the regime would by now have produced video or at minimum a photograph for domestic legitimacy — particularly during a week when the supreme leader's authority over a potential MOU is the central question. The continued vacuum reinforces the Stage-2 managed-leadership-vacuum read. **Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine speech remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation** — no new public statement by Mokhber today; no Iranian state media has produced a follow-up speech, retraction, or amplification in past 24 hours. The institutional intelligence value of Mokhber's speech is durable. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 63. CNN sources continue to report fractured foot, bruised eye, minor lacerations from Feb 28 strike. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel 'out of public view' line operate against each other in the public information space. Pezeshkian provided NO date, NO location, NO list of other participants, NO substantive readout, NO video/audio/photo. Read as intelligence: regime is in second stage of a managed-leadership-vacuum playbook — Stage 1 (March-April) was written-only statements via state TV; Stage 2 (May) is named senior officials publicly attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without producing evidence. **MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' SPEECH REINFORCES THE THESIS:** Mohammad Mokhber (described in Pakistani/Iranian outlets as adviser to Mojtaba specifically) publicly delivered the maximalist Hormuz-control doctrine May 8 — leadership-adjacent voices speaking publicly while Mojtaba himself remains absent. Yesterday's TIME April 21 disclosure of AI-generated videos remains structural reason MOU signature within one week is implausible — leadership-decision authority cannot be exercised through proxies on a deal of this scale. The Pezeshkian claim therefore reads as a credibility-borrowing move INSIDE the negotiation as much as a domestic-narrative move. The IRGC-vs-civilian-government factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made in the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers mid-MOU window. Iran International (diaspora) had run Pezeshkian-IRGC factional-divergence framing this week. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 62. CNN sources continue to report fractured foot, bruised eye, minor lacerations from Feb 28 strike.

recent_signals.headline: DAY 63-64 ABSENCE HOLDS — NO IRANIAN STATE MEDIA CORROBORATION OF PEZESHKIAN'S MAY 8 CLAIM OF 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE MEETING IN THE 48 HOURS SINCE; INFORMATION VACUUM WIDENING. No date, location, participant list, readout, video, photo, or audio. The continued vacuum is the strongest evidence the meeting did not occur as described. CNN/KVIA US-intel assessment 'alive shaping strategy out of public view' unchanged. Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine speech remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation — no new statement, retraction, or amplification today. Stage 2 managed-leadership-vacuum playbook reinforced. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 63.
sources: Searched all major Iranian state outlets (IRNA, Tasnim, Press TV, Mehr, ISNA) — CONFIRMED ABSENCE

recent_signals.headline: DAY 62-63 ABSENCE HOLDS — PEZESHKIAN PUBLIC CLAIM OF 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE MEETING (CLAIMED, no independent verification, no date/location/participants/visual evidence); CNN/KVIA CARRIED FIRST PUBLIC US INTEL ASSESSMENT (CONFIRMED): MOJTABA ALIVE 'SHAPING STRATEGY' BUT INJURED AND 'OUT OF PUBLIC VIEW'; MOKHBER (DESCRIBED AS MOJTABA'S ADVISER) PUBLICLY DELIVERED 'ATOMIC-BOMB' HORMUZ DOCTRINE — LEADERSHIP-ADJACENT VOICES ACTIVE WHILE MOJTABA HIMSELF REMAINS ABSENT. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel 'out of public view' line operate against each other in the public information space. Read as intelligence: Stage 2 of managed-leadership-vacuum playbook — named senior officials publicly attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without producing evidence. Pezeshkian claim reads as credibility-borrowing move INSIDE the negotiation. The IRGC-vs-civilian-government factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers (May 7). Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 62.
sources: Times of Israel + L'Orient + MEE + Deccan Herald (Mokhber speech)
recent_signals.verification: Pezeshkian STATEMENT = CONFIRMED multi-source primary; the actual MEETING = CLAIMED single-side, no independent verification, no date/location/witnesses/visual; US intel 'shaping strategy out of public view' = REPORTED (CNN/KVIA citing US intel community assessment); Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' speech = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (institutional, multi-source primary)

historical_summaries.summary: 4 signals. Appointed Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts | First statement read on Press TV by anchor (no video/audio of Khamenei himself) | Day 29 of conflict — still no video or audio recording of Mojtaba Khamenei released
